title: Persistent Stuff
description: Saves different states of the game across restarts and deaths.
body:
## Archival
Due to limited success this mod won't receive further updates.  
I'm open to updating as a commission, whether to a specific Minecraft version or adding features.  
Create an issue on GitHub or contact me on Discord `@andyrusso` to discuss.

# Persistent Stuff
Saves your toggle sprint (sprinting/walking), hitboxes' (enabled/disabled), chunk borders' (enabled/disabled) states across Minecraft restarts. Never toggle these at startup again.  
And a feature to keep your sprint/sneak toggled after dying on `1.20+`.

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), for configuration requires [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). 

Icon by the [Pufferfish Praise Parliament](https://discord.gg/5AvEYbNpsd) discord server.
___
I accept donations with gratitude on [my Boosty page](https://boosty.to/andyrusso) as one time donations and subscriptions. Subscribers get access to extra mods.  
Donations will help me maintain and make new mods more consistently. Thank you!

[![Support me on Boosty badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88e47c9248a99b7fb01eb4cd1a2cf3f8b7fe21c4.png)](https://boosty.to/andyrusso)
